free_text: Total neutron yields from light elements under proton
and alpha bombardment
5.5-Mv Van de Graaff accelerator
Neutron detector consists of a 5-foot diameter
sphere of reactor-grade graphite with eight BF3
counters embedded around its surface. Efficiency
calibration was done with Ra-Be standard sources.
Energy calibrated using threshold energy for 7Li(p,n)
to be 1.8811 MeV.
4-foot Faraday cup for solid targets
Corrected for:
. energy losses associated with gas targets,
. background (less than 10% except for the first
several points near threshold).
Converted from EXFOR P0001 and updated.
On. Major revisions in 002 and 010.
OS. Sub.13 deleted, duplication with

subentry 15.

and checked by KaChaPaG (Physik-Daten Nr.15-5,1982).
